category_sources: Official GitHub README describes encrypted files via Git clean/smudge filters.
source_facts.description says it configures transparent encryption of files in a Git repo.
docs_sources: No separate official docs site was present in source_facts; README is the official documentation surface.
Official repository README provides overview, usage, installation, contributing, and tests.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/elasticdog/transcrypt; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README lists Git, OpenSSL, Bash requirements and describes protecting passwords/private keys in repositories.
source_facts.description identifies transparent Git repository encryption.
